popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/BYZANTIUM%2010571204.htm#EireneAdied1208 as of 3/29/2016

EIRENE Angelina ([1180/84]-Hohenstaufen 27 Aug 1208, bur Kloster Lorsch).  Niketas Choniates record …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Irene von Byzanz deutsche Stauferkönigin於1172年出生在白展丁 艾皮爾時，她的父親Ισαάκιος Β΄ Άγγελος Βυζαντινός Αυτοκράτορας16歲，母親Irene Komnene Kantakuzene17歲。她於1192年與Re Ruggero III d'Altavilla di Napoli e Sicilia在義大利普格利亞布林迪斯布林迪斯結婚。她去世於1208年8月27日在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 格皮根格皮根霍恩斯陶分享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Irene von Byzanz deutsche Stauferkönigin于1172年出生在白展丁 艾皮爾时，她的父亲Ισαάκιος Β΄ Άγγελος Βυζαντινός Αυτοκράτορας16岁，母亲Irene Komnene Kantakuzene17岁。她于1192年与Re Ruggero III d'Altavilla di Napoli e Sicilia在意大利普格利亞布林迪斯布林迪斯结婚。她去世于1208年8月27日在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 格皮根格皮根霍恩斯陶分享年36岁。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Irene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek eirēnē ‘peace’ it was borne in Greek mythology by a minor goddess who personified peace, and by a Byzantine empress ( 752–803 ). The name was taken up in the English-speaking world at the end of the 19th century, and became popular in the 20th, partly as a result of being used as the name of a character in John Galsworthy's The Forsyte Saga ( 1922 ). It was formerly pronounced in three syllables, as in Greek, but is now thoroughly naturalized as an English name and usually pronounced as two syllables.

en.lifeSummary: When Irene von Byzanz deutsche Stauferkönigin was born in 1172, in Byzantine Empire, her father, Ισαάκιος Β΄ Άγγελος Βυζαντινός Αυτοκράτορας, was 16 and her mother, Irene Komnene Kantakuzene, was 17. She married Re Ruggero III d'Altavilla di Napoli e Sicilia in 1192, in Brindisi, Brindisi, Puglia, Italy. She died on 27 August 1208, in Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Irene von Byzanz deutsche Stauferkönigin est née en 1172, à Empire byzantin, son père, Ισαάκιος Β΄ Άγγελος Βυζαντινός Αυτοκράτορας, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Irene Komnene Kantakuzene, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Re Ruggero III d'Altavilla di Napoli e Sicilia en 1192, à Brindisi, Brindisi, Puglia, Italie. Elle est décédée le 27 août 1208, à Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Irene von Byzanz deutsche Stauferkönigin 1172 in Byzantinisches Reich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ισαάκιος Β΄ Άγγελος Βυζαντινός Αυτοκράτορας 16 und ihre Mutter Irene Komnene Kantakuzene 17. Sie hat 1192 in Brindisi, Brindisi, Puglia, Italien Re Ruggero III d'Altavilla di Napoli e Sicilia geheiratet. Sie starb am 27. August 1208 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Irene von Byzanz deutsche Stauferkönigin è nata il nel 1172 nel Impero bizantino, sua padre, Ισαάκιος Β΄ Άγγελος Βυζαντινός Αυτοκράτορας, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Irene Komnene Kantakuzene, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Re Ruggero III d'Altavilla di Napoli e Sicilia nel 1192, nel Brindisi, Brindisi, Puglia, Italia. Morì il 27 agosto 1208, nel Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Irene von Byzanz deutsche Stauferköniginが1172年に東ローマ帝国で生まれた時，父Ισαάκιος Β΄ Άγγελος Βυζαντινός Αυτοκράτοραςは16歳，母Irene Komnene Kantakuzeneは17歳であった。1192年にイタリアプウグリアブリンディシブリンディシでRe Ruggero III d'Altavilla di Napoli e Siciliaと結婚した。彼女は1208年8月27日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス グoップインジェングoップインジェンホーヘンスタウフンで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Irene von Byzanz deutsche Stauferkönigin(이)가 1172년 비자틴 피르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ισαάκιος Β΄ Άγγελος Βυζαντινός Αυτοκράτορας(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Irene Komnene Kantakuzene(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1192년 이탈리아 푸그리야 브린디시 브린디시에서 Re Ruggero III d'Altavilla di Napoli e Sicilia(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1208년 8월 27일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 그o핀겐 그o핀겐 호헨스타펜에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Irene von Byzanz deutsche Stauferkönigin nasceu em 1172, em Império Bizantino, seu pai, Ισαάκιος Β΄ Άγγελος Βυζαντινός Αυτοκράτορας, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Irene Komnene Kantakuzene, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Re Ruggero III d'Altavilla di Napoli e Sicilia em 1192, em Brindisi, Brindisi, Puglia, Itália. Ela faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1208, em Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Irene von Byzanz deutsche Stauferkönigin родилась в 1172 г. в местности Византийская империя, её отцу по имени Ισαάκιος Β΄ Άγγελος Βυζαντινός Αυτοκράτορας было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Irene Komnene Kantakuzene, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Re Ruggero III d'Altavilla di Napoli e Sicilia в 1192 г. в местности бриндиси, бриндиси, пугля, Италия. Она умерла 27 августа 1208 г. в местности хохенстауфен, гoппинген, ландкрис гoппинген, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Irene von Byzanz deutsche Stauferkönigin nació en 1172, en Imperio bizantino, su papá, Ισαάκιος Β΄ Άγγελος Βυζαντινός Αυτοκράτορας, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Irene Komnene Kantakuzene, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Re Ruggero III d'Altavilla di Napoli e Sicilia en 1192, en Brindisi, Brindisi, Puglia, Italia. Murió el 27 de agosto de 1208, en Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 36 años.
